source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Crane Other Lifting

actions_taken: Injured employee evaluated by telemedical provider
Injured employee transported by helicopter to onshore medical facility
X-rays performed revealing fractures on all 5 toes
BSEE onsite investigation conducted on 17 November 2022
Job Safety Analysis and incident documentation reviewed
event.summary: On 14 November 2022 at approximately 0840 hours, a subcontracted Oceanwide employee injured his left foot while attempting to move an 85-pound flange plate in the well bay area of Talos ERT LLC's SM 130 A Facility. The injured employee grabbed and attempted to position the flange plate prior to receiving assistance from a Performance Energy Service employee, causing the flange plate to fall approximately 26 inches and strike the top of the employee's left foot behind the steel toe protection. X-rays revealed fractures on all 5 toes. The incident resulted in evacuation to an onshore medical facility and lost time away from work exceeding 3 days.

threats.name: Employee attempts to move heavy flange plate without assistance
Loss of control of 85-pound flange plate
Flange plate falls and strikes foot

consequences.name: Lost time away from work exceeding 3 days

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis - Manual Handling Control
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify hazards and required controls

supporting_text: The JSA's table of Hazards and Controls contained the checked off box labeled Manual Handling which stated to get assistance or mechanical aid to avoid pinch points.
The JSA failed to mention any specific steps concerning re-installing the flange plate in the Potential Hazards and Hazard Controls section of the JSA.

controls.name: Talos procedure for weights exceeding 50 pounds
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control requiring assistance or mechanical equipment for heavy loads

supporting_text: The IE failed to follow the Talos procedure which states the use of additional personnel and/or equipment when weights exceed 50 pounds and line-of-fire when moving equipment.
This procedure was not listed on the Job Safety Analysis.

controls.name: Direct instruction from PES supervisor to wait for assistance
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control - supervisor instruction to prevent unsafe manual handling

supporting_text: The PES employee stated he instructed the IE not to attempt to move the flange plate until he returned from retrieving additional welding rods.
The IE did not follow instruction from the PES employee to wait for help in moving the approximately 85 pound flange plate.

controls.name: Steel toe protection on footwear
controls.barrier_role: Personal protective equipment to reduce severity of foot strike injury

supporting_text: The flange plate to fall approximately 26 inches striking the top of the IE's left foot behind the steel toe protection.

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
